title: AI teacher resources route
body: AI Teacher Resources | Games, Lessons & Projects Tool Use the page controls first; this route is a working tool. AI Teacher Resources. AITR. Original games, assignments, projects, and lessons I run, each one written for a table where an AI is in the room to deal, judge, branch, and keep the thread. Not the catalog of outside links, that is teacherresources. This is built work that needs the machine to run. Type Original AI-assisted teaching activities. Holds Games, assignments, projects, lessons. Sibling of ml*, bb*, cc*, mc*. Exempt from anti-yap. Engine methodologylist , the pedagogy is grounded there. Entries 1 No activities match.
